caption: A woman with black hair and glasses is positioned against a solid black background, appearing to speak directly to the camera. She is wearing a light green top with small patterns and a decorative embroidered neckline, paired with a dark necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to her shirt. In the bottom left and bottom center of the frames, a small circular logo and the text "NPTEL" are visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues talking, with her facial expressions shifting slightly. By the final stages of the clip, she raises her right hand, gesturing toward her chest to emphasize her point. The lighting remains consistent, focused on her face and upper body, while the dark backdrop creates a stark contrast.
